# Peri Tracker — llms.txt
# https://peritracker.app/llms.txt
# Last updated: 2026-04-29
#
# Peri Tracker is an iPhone app for tracking perimenopause symptoms.
# It logs hot flashes, sleep, mood, brain fog, and cycle data with severity ratings,
# identifies patterns over time, and exports a PDF report for gynecologist appointments.
# Local-first, no account required. Free 14-day trial.
# Platform: iOS. Price: $2.99/month or $24.99/year.

## App pages (primary)

https://peritracker.app/
> Home — Peri Tracker perimenopause symptom tracker app for iPhone

https://peritracker.app/faq
> Frequently asked questions about Peri Tracker

https://peritracker.app/facts
> Verified perimenopause facts and statistics (NAMS, NIH, Mayo Clinic) + Peri Tracker product reference

## Landing pages

https://peritracker.app/perimenopause-symptom-tracker
> Perimenopause symptom tracker — full feature overview, how to use, FAQs

https://peritracker.app/hot-flash-tracker
> Hot flash tracker app — log frequency, severity, time of day; identify triggers

https://peritracker.app/perimenopause-sleep-tracker
> Perimenopause sleep tracker — log sleep quality, night sweats, morning energy

https://peritracker.app/doctor-visit-prep
> Perimenopause doctor visit prep — export PDF symptom report for gynecologist

https://peritracker.app/apple-health-perimenopause
> Apple Health perimenopause tracker — automatic sleep and heart rate integration

https://peritracker.app/balance-app-alternative
> Balance app alternative — comparison of Peri Tracker vs Balance for symptom tracking

https://peritracker.app/guides
> Guides index
